name: BBC News - World
description: BBC World section: international news, features and analysis from BBC News.
notes: Standard BBC RSS feed; supports many topical sub-feeds.

name: CNN - World
description: CNN.com World edition: breaking and in-depth world news coverage.
notes: Global focus; complements CNN Top Stories feed.

name: Associated Press - World Top News
description: AP hosted World Heads: latest world news headlines from Associated Press.
notes: Syndicated wire headlines; widely used by other outlets.

name: Al Jazeera English - All News
description: Al Jazeera English combined feed with news, analysis and features.
notes: Includes world news plus themed sections (economy, conflicts, investigations, etc.).

name: Financial Times - World
description: Financial Times World section: global politics, economics, business and markets.
notes: Paywalled articles; metadata and excerpts are still available via RSS.

name: NPR - World
description: NPR World: international politics, culture, business and global trends.
notes: Mix of text stories and audio pieces; stable section-specific feed.

name: Deutsche Welle - World (EN)
description: DW World: international news from German public broadcaster Deutsche Welle.
notes: Part of DW’s full English RSS catalogue (all, Europe, Africa, business, etc.).

name: China Daily - World
description: China Daily English World News feed.
notes: Official English-language outlet; multiple topic-specific RSS feeds.

name: New York Times - World
description: New York Times World section RSS feed.
notes: Uses standard NYT RSS pattern /services/xml/rss/nyt/{Section}.xml.

name: Washington Post - World
description: Washington Post World section: breaking world news and analysis.
notes: Dedicated world-only feed; complements homepage and national feeds.

name: The Guardian - World
description: The Guardian World news, with progressive and independent editorial stance.
notes: Guardian offers many region-specific and topic-specific RSS feeds.

name: Fox News - World
description: Fox News World: world politics, conflicts and international stories from a conservative US outlet.
notes: Part of Fox’s official RSS suite (latest, US, politics, opinion, etc.).

name: Breitbart News - Main
description: Breitbart main RSS: conservative news and opinion on US and world politics, economy and culture.
notes: Strongly right-wing; includes politics, world, economy and culture in one stream.

name: Democracy Now! - Daily Show
description: Democracy Now! independent daily TV & radio news program (audio RSS).
notes: Hour-long show with global headlines and interviews; left-progressive editorial line.

name: Jacobin Magazine
description: Jacobin: socialist perspectives on politics, labor, and economics.
notes: Explicitly socialist orientation; useful as left-wing commentary source.

name: Haaretz - World News
description: Haaretz World News: international coverage from liberal Israeli newspaper.
notes: Haaretz is broadly liberal/left-leaning; separate Israel and world feeds available.

name: Jerusalem Post - Breaking News
description: Jerusalem Post breaking news feed covering Israel, the Middle East and world stories.
notes: JPost offers multiple RSS feeds; this one focuses on headlines and breaking items.

name: RT (Russia Today) - News
description: RT news feed from Russian state-funded international TV network.
notes: RT provides world and Russia-focused coverage; considered pro-Kremlin.

name: TASS - All News
description: TASS News Agency combined RSS covering Russian and world news.
notes: Official Russian state newswire; single v2.xml feed for all sections.

name: The Moscow Times - News
description: The Moscow Times: independent English-language news about Russia.
notes: Often critical of Russian government; complements TASS/RT state perspectives.

name: The Hindu - World News
description: The Hindu international news feed from major Indian daily.
notes: The Hindu is known for relatively balanced, serious coverage; multiple section RSS feeds.

name: NDTV - World News
description: NDTV World News: international coverage from leading Indian TV network.
notes: Part of NDTV’s broader RSS offering (India, business, sports, etc.).

name: UNIAN - News Agency (EN)
description: UNIAN English-language news agency feed on Ukrainian and world events.
notes: Covers politics, economy, sports and world news from a Ukrainian perspective.

name: Ukrainska Pravda - All News
description: Ukrainska Pravda combined RSS: socio-political and economic events in Ukraine.
notes: Major Ukrainian outlet; useful for original-language coverage.

name: Euromaidan Press
description: Euromaidan Press: English-language independent news and analysis on Ukraine.
notes: Volunteer-launched; focuses on war, reforms and Russian aggression.

name: Le Monde - International
description: Le Monde International section: articles, videos and infographics on world news.
notes: Le Monde RSS pattern adds rss_full.xml to section URLs; feeds include title, summary and URL.

name: Der Spiegel - Ausland
description: Der Spiegel Ausland: international news from major German weekly.
notes: Spiegel offers full-site and section-specific RSS feeds (politics, economy, etc.).

name: Sydney Morning Herald - World
description: Sydney Morning Herald World: latest world news, events, analysis and opinion.
notes: Part of SMH’s larger RSS set (politics, business, etc.).

name: The Japan Times - Top Stories
description: The Japan Times latest articles: politics, business, culture, life & sports.
notes: Japan-focused but with regular Asia and world coverage.

name: China.org.cn - General
description: China.org.cn general RSS: news about China, politics, economy, culture.
notes: Official portal aggregating Chinese government and state-media content.

name: Clarín - Mundo
description: Clarín Mundo: international news from major Argentine daily.
notes: Clarín provides many RSS channels (Últimas Noticias, Política, Sociedad, Economía, etc.).
